DAO Proposals Incoming!

It's almost time to have your voice heard with DAO Proposals.   

Mark your calendars, the first DAO Proposal, or PIP-1, will be released tomorrow at 2pm ET / 6pm UTC!

 | Get ready and secure your POLIS Voting Power now at https://govern.staratlas.com/
